lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the battle round, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is destroyed, you can use a triple 6 from that roll to use this ability instead of activating any Blessings of Khorne at the start of that battle round. If you do, this model is no longer destroyed and in the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, it is set up anywhere on the battlefield using its Deep Strike ability, with 8 wounds remaining.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the battle round, select one Wrathful Presence ability. Until the start of the next battle round, this model has that ability.

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, if this model is on the battlefield, you can re-roll up to 6 of the D6 rolled.

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: While a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit is within 6" of this model, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that unit's Move characteristic and to Advance and Charge rolls made for it, and each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to that attack's Weapon Skill characteristic and/or any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time an enemy unit within 6" of this model is selected to Fall Back, that unit must take a Leadership test. If that test is failed, that unit must Remain Stationary this phase instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Charge phase, if this model is leading a unit and that unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you must take a Leadership test for this model. If that test is failed, one Bodyguard model of your choice in that unit is destroyed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with 3 wounds remaining.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berserkers^^**

lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berserkers^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally through models and terrain features. When making a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, models in that unit can move within Engagement Range of enemy models, but cannot end that move within Engagement Range of them and any Desperate Escape test is automatically passed.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model's unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model, then roll one D6: on a 2-3, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Pistol

lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its hellforged weapons have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, one model from your army with this ability can use it when a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit within 12" of this model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Khorne with wings

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit that it moved over during that move and roll 6 D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

profiles.name: Daemon Prince of Khorne with wings

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a Move characteristic of 10" and each time a model in that unit makes a Normal, Advance, Fall Back or Charge move, it can move horizontally though terrain features.

profiles.name: Crush All Who Stand Before Us

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, you can use this ability. When determining which models in this unit are eligible to fight, any models in it that are within 3" of one or more enemy models are eligible to fight. When resolving those attacks, such models can target one of those enemy units that is within 3" of them and within Engagement Range of their unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**, ^^**Khorne Berserkers^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Khorne Berserkers^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a ^^**Character^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's unit destroys a ^^**Character^^** model, you gain 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance rolls made for that unit and each time that unit makes a Blood Surge move, you can re-roll the D6 used to determine how far models in that unit move.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your opponent's Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blood Surge move. To do so, roll one D6 and add 2 to the roll: models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding ^^**Aircraft^^**). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

lines.value: Melee

lines.value: Pistol

lines.value: Pistol

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If the bearer's unit contains 1 or more Icons of Khorne, each time the bearer's unit destroys an enemy unit, you gain one Bloodshed point. Each time you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6 for each Bloodshed point you have, after which, all your Bloodshed points are lost.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Model in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Each time this unit declares a charge that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ^^**World Eaters Infantry^^** models. Each ^^**Possessed^^** and ^^**Terminator^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Rapid Fire 2, Sustained Hits 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^*). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through friendly ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:
- Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.value: Rapid Fire 4

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your opponent's Shooting phase, and in the Fight phase, each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot or fight, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

lines.value: Rapid Fire 1, Twin-linked

lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model declares a charge that targets one or more units below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. If one or more of the targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Charge roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your opponent's Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ models. It cannot transport ^^**Possessed^^** or ^^**Terminator^^** models.

lines.value: Double 2+

lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-In or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 3+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 4+ or Triple 1+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 5+ or Triple 2+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 6+ or Triple 3+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an ^^**Infantry^^** unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

This unit cannot make a Blood Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Blood Surge move per phase.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Model in this unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll. Each time this unit declares a charge that targets the closest enemy unit, you can re-roll the Charge roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control until your opponent's Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly ^^**World Eaters^^** unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack that targets a unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**), add 1 to the Hit roll. If that attack targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an enemy ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that unit must take Desperate Escape tests.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 14 ^^**World Eaters Infantry^^** models. Each ^^**Possessed^^** and ^^**Terminator^^** model takes up the space of 2 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** target within 18", you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^*). Until the start of your next turn, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move through friendly ^^**Monster^^** and ^^**Vehicle^^** models and sections of terrain features that are 4" or less in height.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
At the end of your opponent's Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that was set up on the battlefield within 12" of this model; this model can then either:
- Shoot at that unit, but only if it is an eligible target.
- Declare a charge against that unit (note that even if this charge is successful, this model does not receive any Charge bonus this turn).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target within 18", you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your opponent's Shooting phase, and in the Fight phase, each time an enemy unit targets this model, after that unit has finished making its attacks, this model can either shoot or fight, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is equipped with 2 melee weapons in addition to its close combat weapon, add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of those two weapons.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that can ^^**Fly^^**, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model declares a charge that targets one or more units below Starting Strength, add 1 to the Charge roll. If one or more of the targets of that charge are Below Half-strength, add 2 to the Charge roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll and, if that attack targets an enemy unit that is Below Half-Strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your opponent's Movement phase, each time an enemy unit is set up or ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this model, any units embarked within it can disembark.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 ^^**World Eaters Infantry**^^ models. It cannot transport ^^**Possessed^^** or ^^**Terminator^^** models.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the battle round, if this unit is on the battlefield, when you make a Blessings of Khorne roll, roll one additional D6.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 4 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 1+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: You can re-roll Charge rolls made for this unit.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 2+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a Pile-In or Consolidation move, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 3+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 4+ or Triple 1+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 5+ or Triple 2+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Roll
lines.value: Double 6+ or Triple 3+

lines.name: Effect
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack that targets an ^^**Infantry^^** unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit shoots its Cerberus neutron pulse array in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, that weapon has the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 30 <FACTION> INFANTRY or <FACTION> MOUNTED models. Each JUMP PACK, POSSESSED and TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models. Each OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models. Each MOUNTED model takes up the space of 4 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that is not Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, remove it from play without resolving its Deadly Demise ability. Then, at the end of the phase, roll one D6: on a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with D6 wounds remaining.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and, if that unit is within range of an objective marker you do not control, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model’s Punisher rotary cannon has the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability when targeting INFANTRY units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model shoots in your Shooting phase, provided it Remained Stationary this turn, all [HEAVY] weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if one or more of those attacks made with its Scorpius multi-launcher scored a hit against an enemy INFANTRY unit, that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model can disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and if they do they must be set up more than 9" away from all enemy models.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK, WULFEN, PHOBOS, GRAVIS, CENTURION, TERMINATOR, OBLITERATOR, POSSESSED or TACTICUS models (excluding TACTICUS CHARACTER models that began the battle attached to a non-TACTICUS unit).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 22 <FACTION> INFANTRY models and 1 DREADNOUGHT model. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, TERMINATOR or POSSESSED model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a VEHICLE, improve the Strength and Damage characteristic of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a FORTIFICATION unit, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 28 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, TERMINATOR or POSSESSED model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model from your army, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fellblade model, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack with its twin Falchion volcano cannon that targets a MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, subtract 6 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 45 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, POSSESSED or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 2 DREADNOUGHT or HELBRUTE models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic e.g. A DREADNOUGHT with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8  models).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-13 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save against ranged attacks

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 55 <FACTION> Infantry or <FACTION> MOUNTED models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, POSSESSED or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each MOUNTED, CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models. This model can also transport up to 1 RHINO model (this model – and any models embarked within it – take up the space of 25 models).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-8 wounds remaining, subtract 5 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its melee weapons have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. In addition, once per battle, this model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved across during that move and roll six D6: for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, POSSESSED or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, POSSESSED or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 <FACTION> INFANTRY models. Each JUMP PACK, WULFEN, GRAVIS, POSSESSED or TERMINATOR model takes up the space of 2 models and each CENTURION or OBLITERATOR model takes up the space of 3 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: When making ranged attacks, this model can target enemy units within Engagement Range of it with Blast weapons (provided no other friendly units are also within Engagement Range of that enemy unit). In addition, when making ranged attacks, this model does not suffer the penalty to its Hit rolls for being within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model has a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return one destroyed Bodyguard model to that unit.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model and those weapons have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model can be attached to the following units: ^^**Eightbound^^**, ^^**Exalted Eightbound^^**

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is attached to a ^^**World Eaters Possessed^^** unit during the Declare Battle Formations step, this model has the Deep Strike and Scouts 6" abilities.

lines.value: While a friendly ^^Blood Legions^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.value: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

lines.value: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.value: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
